name: Chinese Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, prepared mustard, ginger, sugar, and garlic in a bowl. Stir well to mix.
2. Pour the mixture over the chicken wings and turn off all surfaces so they are evenly coated.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. At serving time, preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
5. Bake for 1 hour or grill until cooked through.
